description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Data, Spring Security, Spring Web, etc.) to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Ensure build tooling and plugins are compatible with Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21 (LTS) and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* in Photo.java model. Updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin:21. Added spring.jpa.open-in-view=false to application.properties. Spring Framework upgraded to 6.2.x and Hibernate ORM to 6.6.x. Build passes and unit tests pass.
